title: CatBoost correction weight 0.10
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.10 against the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Ensure the final blend is exactly 0.90 * realmlp_core + 0.10 * catboost_pred. Keep CatBoost training and RealMLP core otherwise unchanged.
expected_effect: Confirm whether the known good CatBoost correction is close to a 10 percent contribution.
risk: If the current parent already effectively uses this weight, the result may be a duplicate.
